## Checklist
- [ ] Tested in Chrome and/or Firefox
- [ ] No errors in the browser console
- [ ] Single-file constraint respected — no new external dependencies added
- [ ] Collision detection and scoring still feel correct
- [ ] Works on mobile (tap to jump)
- [ ] README or docs updated if behaviour changed
